# Add feed URLs or scraper outputs here.
#
# Pipeline: On each build, process_pending_feeds.py reads this file,
# inserts rows into the Supabase `feeds` table, then resets this file
# to the template below. export_feeds_txt.py then regenerates feeds.txt
# from the DB. Do not edit feeds.txt manually.
#
# The "# Source Name" comment becomes the display name in the calendar
# (user-visible source attribution under each event card). Use the bare
# canonical venue/source name only — no parenthetical context, no event
# counts, no strategy notes. Put verification/discovery notes in
# SOURCES_CHECKLIST.md, not here.
#
# --- ICS feed URLs ---
# Just add the name and URL. The build handles everything else.
#
#   # Source Name
#   https://example.com/events/?ical=1
#
# --- Scrapers ---
# Add the name, cmd, and output path here. But scrapers ALSO need a
# line added to .github/workflows/generate-calendar.yml (in the city's
# scrape step). This file only handles the DB insert; the workflow
# entry is what actually runs the scraper.
#
#   # Source Name
#   # cmd: python scrapers/example.py --name "Source Name"
#   cities/dc-music/example.ics
#
# Test before adding:
#   python scripts/add_feed.py URL dc-music "Source Name" --test
#   python scripts/add_scraper.py example dc-music "Source Name" --test
#
# See CONTRIBUTING.md for details.

# Ticketmaster DC Music
# cmd: python scrapers/ticketmaster.py --city Washington --state DC --classification Music --name "Ticketmaster DC Music"
cities/dc-music/ticketmaster_dc_music.ics

# Church of the Epiphany Tuesday Concerts
https://epiphanydc.org/events/category/epiphany-tuesday-concert-series/?ical=1

# Sid Gold's Request Room
https://www.sidgolds.com/?ical=1

# DC Jazz Jam
# cmd: python scrapers/dc_jazz_jam.py
cities/dc-music/dc_jazz_jam.ics

# The Pocket
# cmd: python scrapers/the_pocket.py
cities/dc-music/the_pocket.ics

# Jojo's Restaurant and Bar
# cmd: python scrapers/dcmusic_live.py --slug jojo --name "Jojo's Restaurant and Bar" --address "1518 U Street NW, Washington, DC 20009"
cities/dc-music/dcmusic_jojo.ics

# Madam's Organ
# cmd: python scrapers/dcmusic_live.py --slug madamsorgan --name "Madam's Organ" --address "2461 18th St NW, Washington, DC 20009"
cities/dc-music/dcmusic_madamsorgan.ics

# Flash
# cmd: python scrapers/flash.py
cities/dc-music/flash.ics

# Bossa Bistro + Lounge
# cmd: python scrapers/bossa.py
cities/dc-music/bossa.ics

# Atlas Performing Arts Center
# cmd: python scrapers/dcmusic_live.py --slug atlasarts --name "Atlas Performing Arts Center" --address "1333 H St NE, Washington, DC 20002"
cities/dc-music/dcmusic_atlasarts.ics

# Hill Center
# cmd: python scrapers/dcmusic_live.py --slug hillcenter --name "Hill Center" --address "921 Pennsylvania Ave SE, Washington, DC 20003"
cities/dc-music/dcmusic_hillcenter.ics

# Mr. Henry's
# cmd: python scrapers/dcmusic_live.py --slug mrhenrys --name "Mr. Henry's" --address "601 Pennsylvania Ave SE, Washington, DC 20003"
cities/dc-music/dcmusic_mrhenrys.ics

# National Gallery of Art
# cmd: python scrapers/dcmusic_live.py --slug nga --name "National Gallery of Art" --address "6th St & Constitution Ave NW, Washington, DC 20565"
cities/dc-music/dcmusic_nga.ics

# Takoma Station Tavern
# cmd: python scrapers/dcmusic_live.py --slug takomastation --name "Takoma Station Tavern" --address "6914 4th St NW, Washington, DC 20012"
cities/dc-music/dcmusic_takomastation.ics

# Library of Congress
# cmd: python scrapers/dcmusic_live.py --slug libraryofcongress --name "Library of Congress" --address "101 Independence Ave SE, Washington, DC 20540"

# openmikes.org DC
# cmd: python scrapers/openmikes.py --city-slug Washington-DC --name "openmikes.org DC"
cities/dc-music/openmikes_dc.ics
